page_metadata.biotools__summary: MMRFBiolinks isn R package that extends TCGABiolink package for integrative analysis with MMRF-COMMPASS data. IMMRFBiolinks extends TCGABiolink package for searching, downloading and analyzing MMRF-COMMPASS data available at the NCI’s Genomic Data Commons (GDC) Data Portal.
